free_text: Experimental determination of cross sections for
several insufficiently known neutron induced reaction
are given for isotopes with Z=74-79.
HPGE-Detector of 160 cm**3 volume and 1.8 keV
values used in Nb monitor measurement:
These values for Nb and Al are given in Table 6.1 of
R,RI-259,2003 as used as reference cross sections.
Total error of experimental cross-section data
MONITORs values used were given as free text.

errors values were deleted from COMMON.
Al-27(N,A) monitor was deleted ( Nb93(n,2) monitor was
measured relative to Al27(N,A) in 41240.003 Entry).
Values of Nb monitor were added in Subentries.
